points.text: Terraform provisions the VPC, subnets, and the NAT gateway per environment.
The ECS Fargate task scales to zero when the SQS queue is empty.
CloudFront signs every viewer request through a Lambda@Edge auth function.
Artifact Registry stores the container image the Cloud Run service pulls.
A workload identity federation pool lets GitHub Actions deploy keylessly.
The load balancer forwards HTTPS traffic to the private subnet targets.
Firestore holds durable agent sessions and per-call token usage.
BigQuery backs the semantic layer that dbt materialises nightly.
IAM roles are least-privilege: the runtime service account only reads storage.
CloudWatch alarms trigger the lifecycle Lambda to wake the sleeping service.
Secrets live in SSM Parameter Store and are injected at container start.
The origin record repoints to the running task's IP on a state change.
Sear the short rib hard on every side before it goes into the braise.
A pinch of salt in the caramel stops the sugar from tasting flat.
Let the dough prove until it has doubled and springs back slowly.
Deglaze the pan with wine to lift the fond into the sauce.
Rest the roast for fifteen minutes so the juices redistribute.
Temper the chocolate to 31 degrees for a glossy, snappy shell.
Blanch the greens then shock them in ice water to keep them vivid.
Toast the spices whole before grinding to wake up the oils.
A cold pan and slow heat renders the duck skin to a crisp.
Fold, don't stir, to keep the air in the whipped egg whites.
Salt the pasta water until it tastes like the sea.
Reduce the stock by half to concentrate the umami.
A red giant sheds its outer layers into a glowing planetary nebula.
Tidal forces near the black hole stretch infalling matter into spaghetti.
The exoplanet's transit dims the star by a fraction of a percent.
Cosmic microwave background radiation is the afterglow of the early universe.
A supernova forges elements heavier than iron in seconds.
The galaxy's spiral arms are density waves, not fixed rivers of stars.
Gravitational lensing bends the light of distant quasars around a cluster.
Pulsars sweep beams of radio across space like a lighthouse.
Dark matter's gravity holds galaxies together faster than visible mass allows.
The habitable zone is the orbit where liquid water can persist.
A comet's tail always points away from the sun, pushed by solar wind.
Redshift tells us the distant galaxies are racing away from us.
The yield curve inverts when short-term rates exceed long-term ones.
Diversification lowers portfolio variance without cutting expected return.
A call option's value rises with the underlying's implied volatility.
Compounding turns a modest annual return into large long-run growth.
The central bank raises rates to cool an overheating economy.
Free cash flow, not accounting profit, is what actually services debt.
A stock's beta measures how it moves relative to the broad market.
Hedging with futures locks in a price and caps the downside.
Liquidity dries up first in the assets no one wants in a panic.
Duration measures a bond's price sensitivity to interest-rate changes.
Dollar-cost averaging smooths the entry price over volatile months.
An arbitrage closes the moment two prices for one asset converge.
A dominant seventh chord pulls strongly back toward the tonic.
The relative minor shares every note with its major key.
Syncopation places the accent on the weak part of the beat.
A suspended chord delays the resolution of its third.
Modulation shifts the tonal centre to a new key mid-piece.
Counterpoint weaves independent melodies that agree harmonically.
The circle of fifths orders keys by their shared accidentals.
A pedal tone holds one note while the harmony moves above it.
Voice leading moves each part by the smallest possible interval.
The tritone splits the octave exactly in half and craves resolution.
A ii-V-I is the gravitational backbone of jazz harmony.
Rubato stretches the tempo expressively without losing the pulse.
The octopus changes both colour and texture to vanish into the reef.
Coral polyps host algae that feed them through photosynthesis.
A whale fall seeds the deep seabed with decades of nutrients.
Bioluminescent plankton light the wake of a boat at night.
The anglerfish lures prey with a glowing modified fin ray.
Sea turtles navigate thousands of miles by the Earth's magnetic field.
Kelp forests sequester carbon and shelter entire food webs.
The mantis shrimp strikes fast enough to boil the surrounding water.
Cleaner wrasse pick parasites from far larger fish that never eat them.
Nudibranchs steal the stinging cells of the prey they consume.
A school of fish turns as one to confuse a circling predator.
Hydrothermal vents feed life on chemistry, not sunlight.
